# WatchWorldCup.us — Premium IPTV

> Premium IPTV service streaming every FIFA World Cup 2026 match live in 4K/8K, plus 35,000+ live TV channels, 147,000 movies and 62,000 series. Works on Smart TV, Amazon Firestick, Android, iPhone, iPad and PC. Instant activation (1–5 minutes), free VPN included, 24/7 WhatsApp support. Plans from $25 for 3 months.

## Key facts

- FIFA World Cup 2026 runs June 11 – July 19, 2026, hosted by the USA, Canada and Mexico (48 teams, 104 matches).
- A single subscription covers all 104 World Cup matches live in up to 4K/8K, including the final on July 19 at MetLife Stadium.
- Plans: $25 / 3 months, $38 / 6 months, $62 / 12 months. No contract, prepaid, no auto-renewal.
- Commentary available in English, French, Spanish, German, Arabic, Greek, Albanian and more.
- Delivery: M3U playlist or Xtream codes by email within 1–5 minutes of purchase.
- Compatible apps: IPTV Smarters Pro, TiviMate, GSE Smart IPTV, Perfect Player, VLC and others.
- Free trial available on request via WhatsApp (+212 723 279 328).
- Recommended internet speed: 10 Mbps for HD, 25 Mbps for 4K.

## Main pages

- [World Cup 2026 IPTV package](https://watchworldcup.us/world-cup-2026-iptv/): all 104 matches in 4K, pricing and FAQ
- [World Cup 2026 match schedule](https://watchworldcup.us/world-cup-2026-iptv/matches/): every fixture with a how-to-watch page per match
- [Pricing & subscription](https://watchworldcup.us/#pricing): plans and payment methods (PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Revolut, crypto)
- [How to watch World Cup 2026 guide](https://watchworldcup.us/blog/how-to-watch-world-cup-2026): full streaming guide
- [IPTV setup guide](https://watchworldcup.us/blog/iptv-setup-guide): device installation steps
- [UK IPTV](https://watchworldcup.us/uk/) · [USA IPTV](https://watchworldcup.us/usa/): country-specific information

## Support

- WhatsApp: +212 723 279 328 (24/7)
- Email: sam91nel@gmail.com

Premium IPTV is an independent streaming service and is not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA.
